heroSubtitle: Need help, a solution, immediate assistance?
heroDescription: A local expert responds to you in less than 5 minutes, anywhere in the world... And in your language!
expertsDescription: Less than 5 minutes, and it rings: an expert picks up, wherever you are, in your language.
pricingDescription: Choose who you want to talk to: {strong}a lawyer{/strong}? {strong}An expat{/strong}?
lawyerOfferDescription: A clear, actionable response, adapted to your case.
concreteExamplesDescription: An expert for every need, period.
whyChooseDescription: Designed to be fast, stay clear and really support you: mobile first.
serviceFollowsYou: The service that follows you everywhere.
connectImmediately: Lawyer or expat, we connect you right away.
adaptsToYou: We adapt to you and it's ultra-fast.
joinNetworkDescription: Lawyers or expats: join us and turn your skills into real opportunities.
expatJoinTitle: Share your experience wherever you are in the world
reviewsDescription: Real testimonials, varied situations so everyone can relate.
trustedBy15000Expats: Join more than {strong}15,000 expats{/strong} who trust us to move forward abroad.
appTipDownload: Tip: download the {strong}SOS Expat by Ulixai{/strong} app to go online/offline when you want.
verifiedExpertsAvailable: Over 200 verified experts available in 150+ countries to assist you.
toggleDownloadApp: The app that makes you feel good!
installHintGeneric: Your browser doesn't allow automatic installation. Try Chrome/Edge (desktop) or Safari/Chrome (mobile).
installHintIOS: Your browser doesn't allow automatic installation. On iPhone/iPad: Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen.
installHintAndroid: Your browser doesn't allow automatic installation. On Android: Chrome → menu ⋮ → Install app.
installHintDesktop: Your browser doesn't allow automatic installation. On desktop: Chrome/Edge → Install icon in address bar.

howItWorks.subtitle: The secret recipe to never struggle abroad again
howItWorks.description: Discover how to get legal or expat help in 3 simple, fast and secure steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our expert profiles and find your perfect match (like Tinder, but for administrative nightmares!)
howItWorks.step2Desc: Book a time slot that suits you and describe your situation.
howItWorks.step2Badge: Get called back in less than 5 minutes!
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive tailor-made advice that will turn your ordeal into a walk in the park. Promise!
howItWorks.whyUsSubtitle: Because we've been through the same struggles as you!
howItWorks.verifiedDesc: All our experts are certified and have survived the same ordeals as you. They know the drill!
howItWorks.fastDesc: Faster than sushi delivery! Often a response the same day, sometimes within minutes.
howItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Join the community of happy expats!
howItWorks.ctaDesc: More than 25,000 expats trust us with their daily struggles. What are you waiting for?
